title: Require declaration before use for parameters, nets, variables, and named events

features.name: parameter_use_before_declaration_in_task
features.description: Code should include a task where a parameter is used in a declaration before a localparam with the same name is declared within the same task scope, causing shadowing behavior

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance; feature tests parameter declaration ordering and shadowing
